prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类/理科最低位次依次为7485→6737→18550→8889→5939。2023年因吉林省首年新高考改革出现异常波动（18550），2024年迅速恢复至8889名，202 5年进一步回升至5939名，已接近2022年6737名水平，恢复趋势明确。2025年5939名为近年最低位次（数字最小），反映竞争最为激烈；该校在吉林省物理类招 生计划2021–2022年均为96人，2023年100人，2024–2025年均为92人，2026年计划92人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局无直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉理 工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年55名→2022年55名→2023年54名→2024年52名→2025年48名→2026年54名，近年排名在48–55区间波动，2026年较2025年 下降6位，属中上水平211，有\"984.5\"之称；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及校园安全事件），但该事件较为特殊，对报考心理影响有限；抖音热度排名第98位 ，评价\"一般\"，短视频平台曝光量处于211高校中下水平，未出现高热关注信号；2021–2025年均无投档断档记录，录取走势平稳；材料科学与工程A、交通运 输工程A-、机械工程A-，共3个A-及以上学科。材料学科为传统王牌，与招生专业中的材料类、机械类、交通运输类等高度对应，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校优势工科方向契合；土木建筑、生化环材等专业明显劝退。吉林省2026年高考总 人数约110868人，较2025年约11.1万基本持平；物理类考生估算约79825人，较2025年80421人略减约0.7%，竞争压力略有缓和。；武汉理工大学位于湖北省武汉市，属华中地区，对吉林省考生而言属于跨省就读。该校在吉林省物理类招生计划92人，占比较小，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5939名、2026年招生计划持平、吉林省物理类考生数略减、学校软科排名小幅下滑、声誉热度平稳等因素，预计2026年录取位次在5939名基础上小幅后移 。预测最低位次约5999名，区间5499–6499名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5499–6499名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（5499名以内）可重点冲击计算机类、电子信息类等热门一档专业；位次在区间中段（约5800–6200名）以机械类、材料类等二档优势专业为主；位次接近区间上限（6400名以上）建议以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次相对友好的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were 7485 → 6737 → 18550 → 8889 → 5939. In 2023, due to the first year of the new Gaokao reform in Jilin Province, there was an abnormal fluctuation (18550), which quickly recovered to 8889 in 2024, and further rebounded to 5939 in 2025, approaching the 2022 level of 6737, indicating a clear recovery trend. The 2025 ranking of 5939 is the lowest in recent years (smallest number), reflecting the most intense competition; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 96 students in 2021–2022, 100 in 2023, 92 in 2024–2025, and 92 planned for 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction affecting the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026 are 55 → 55 → 54 → 52 → 48 → 54, fluctuating within the 48–55 range in recent years, with a drop of 6 places in 2026 compared to 2025, placing it at an upper-middle level 211, known as "984.5"; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving campus safety incidents), but the incident is specific and has limited impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 98th, rated as "average", with short video platform exposure at a lower-middle level among 211 universities, without high attention signals; from 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission gaps, with a stable admission trend; it has 3 A- or above disciplines: Materials Science and Engineering A, Transportation Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-. Materials Science is a traditional strong point, highly aligned with the enrollment majors such as Materials, Mechanical, and Transportation, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are consistently highly recommended, aligning with the university's strong engineering fields; majors like Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. The total number of Gaokao examinees in Jilin Province in 2026 is approximately 110,868, roughly unchanged from about 111,000 in 2025; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 79,825, a slight decrease of about 0.7% from 80,421 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, in Central China, which is an out-of-province study destination for Jilin candidates. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province is 92 students, a relatively small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5939, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in the number of Physics Category examinees in Jilin Province, a slight drop in the university's Soft Science ranking, and stable reputation and popularity, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will slightly shift backward from 5939. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5999, with a range of 5499–6499.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Automation (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical (Intelligent Manufacturing) (Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Industrial Engineering)
- Materials (Materials Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Inorganic Non-Metallic Materials Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering, Composite Materials and Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Mathematics (Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Engineering Mechanics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering, Engineering Management)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical (including Biology) (Biotechnology, Applied Chemistry, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5499–6499, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. For rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within 5499), focus on competitive Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; for rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 5800–6200), prioritize Tier 2 advantageous majors like Mechanical and Materials; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (above 6400), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as a safety, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively friendly rankings.
